profile.name: Hung Kien Luu
profile.title: Product Leader, AI-Native Builder
profile.summary: Product leader building AI-enabled systems across payments and vertical SaaS. 0-to-1 builder and scale operator, most recently Head of Product for Square's Local Services vertical at $100B+ gross payments volume (GPV) scale. Pairs retention and growth work with AI-powered execution that compresses discovery cycles and increases decision velocity.
profile.positioning: Operator at scale + AI-native builder + fast execution system

experience.role: Head of Product, Local Services Vertical

subroles.name: Product Lead, Local Services Audience
subroles.description: Led product strategy for Square's largest seller segment (Health & Beauty, Home Services, Professional Services), owning multi-surface workflows across Invoices, Appointments, Estimates, Contracts, Projects, POS Services/Bookings modes, and seller lifecycle growth.
bullets: Owned a $100B+ GPV portfolio across 1M+ active sellers, with scope expansion in 2025 to include Health & Beauty and Appointments.
Led 4 senior PMs and coordinated a 100+ person cross-functional team at peak; built an internal AI PM Second Brain to automate context ingestion and daily briefs.
Improved seller retention with statistical significance, contributing to retained and expanded GPV; operationalized AI agents for feedback ingestion and triage.
Shipped and scaled non-card bank payment flows (discovery -> checkout -> settlement -> reconciliation) to $1B+ annualized volume.
Increased software attach by shipping an end-to-end local services suite (Inquiry -> Estimate -> Booking -> Contract -> Invoice -> Payment).
Shipped and tested a voice AI intake and quoting agent with evaluation criteria, quality thresholds, and human handoff rules.

subroles.name: Senior Product Manager, Invoices & Payments
bullets: Scaled Invoices ~10x into one of Square's top revenue product areas, growing into a $2xxM revenue business unit.
Expanded Invoices into a services workflow suite (Estimates, Contracts, Projects) plus job pipeline orchestration.
Introduced early AI-assisted quoting and invoicing features to explore automation of service sales and payment workflows.
Led PM for iOS and Android apps connecting business clients with freelancers; improved new mobile client conversion 4x.
Shipped applicant tracking, freelancer and job search, and onboarding; helped drive company-wide mobile-first transformation.

experience.summary: Led PM for Pac-12 mobile app, Pac-12.com, and International; increased engagement 50%+.
Built and shipped a travel app marketplace for user-generated itineraries using lean startup methods.
Led acquisitions and strategic investments for the Collaboration Software business unit; executed an acquisition integrated into Cisco WebEx Teams.
Completed 8 transactions (IPO, M&A, debt financings) valued at $8.6B+.

caseStudies.title: AI PM Second Brain
caseStudies.problem: High coordination overhead and context switching slowed decision cycles across a large cross-functional organization.
caseStudies.approach: Built internal AI workflows for context ingestion, daily brief generation, and opportunity triage.
caseStudies.outcome: Reduced work about the work and increased decision velocity for PM and partner teams.

caseStudies.title: Non-Card Bank Payments at Scale
caseStudies.problem: Service businesses needed lower-cost, more flexible payment rails beyond cards.
caseStudies.approach: Shipped end-to-end flows across discovery, checkout, settlement, and reconciliation.
caseStudies.outcome: Scaled to $1B+ annualized volume with strong growth trajectory.

caseStudies.title: Local Services Workflow Suite
caseStudies.problem: Sellers lacked integrated software across the full service lifecycle.
caseStudies.approach: Delivered a connected suite from inquiry to payment across web, mobile, and POS.
caseStudies.outcome: Improved software attach and created a stronger retention engine.

Payments & Infra: Non-card payment strategy (ACH, Zelle, Bitcoin, BNPL)
